bug_report.summary: Pasting accented text into mirrored snippet placeholder changes first character casing (É → é) instead of preserving exact clipboard text
steps_to_reproduce: Create a snippet with duplicated placeholder `${1:Paste title}` in YAML frontmatter title and an H1.
In an empty document, type: `Éléonore — déjà vu`
Select all and copy to clipboard (Ctrl+A, Ctrl+C).
Insert the snippet so placeholder 1 is active.
expected_behaviors: Both mirrored placeholder locations should display exactly: `Éléonore — déjà vu` (including initial uppercase É, accents, punctuation).
actual_behaviors: Both mirrored locations show `éléonore — déjà vu` (initial uppercase É is changed to lowercase é).

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — predicted an non-executed action as executed

bug_report.summary: App/window title label ('Zettlr') missing in top-left title/panel area after launch
steps_to_reproduce: Open the application (reach the initial welcome/setup screen).
expected_behaviors: The desktop/window title area shows the application name/title (e.g., 'Zettlr') when the app is the active window (as in the before-change build).
actual_behaviors: The top-left title/panel area where 'Zettlr' appeared is blank/missing in the after-change build.
